assertions.title: Parser migration to typed yargs is complete

steps.expected: CLI parser should use typed yargs and produce typed command intent
steps.observed: parser.ts imports `yargs` and typed `Argv`, defines `buildParser(...): Argv<ParserOptions>`, and resolves typed `CommandIntent` via `parseCliArgs`.

steps.expected: CLI runtime should dispatch from parser intent rather than ad-hoc argv parsing
steps.observed: cli.ts calls `parseCliArgs(Bun.argv.slice(2), scriptName)` once and dispatches by `switch (intent.type)`.
